element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic immediately playable; arcade-style accessibility
Signature mechanic that defies realistic physics; core to power fantasy
Consequence-free aggression; enables aggressive playstyle without penalties
Discovery-based progression; rewards exploration and experimentation
Meta-progression; persistent records encourage repeated play

typical_tension_triggers: Loss of possession under defensive pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced arcade action with frequent scoring plays; momentum-driven tension based on scoreboard state and possession flow rather than level progression

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret characters hidden in character select or unlock system; discovery through experimentation

difficulty_curve.early_game: Immediately accessible; arcade-style quick-start design allows casual play from first match
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponent AI scaling based on player performance; scoring speeds increase
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tournament progression increases opponent difficulty; requires mastery of exaggerated mechanics
notable_spikes: Tournament Edition mode introduces more player attributes and substitution management complexity
AI opponent skill ramp in arcade tournament progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential opponent matches leading toward championship; each match escalates opponent skill level
notable_level_patterns.example_level: NBA Jam Tournament Edition (1994) arcade/console version

notable_level_patterns.description: Self-contained single games without overarching progression; designed for arcade drop-in/drop-out play
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Standard exhibition match in 1993 arcade version
